variables.notes: No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to COGS/cost of sales appears in the operating-section excerpt above the financial lines. Therefore, relative to the selected parent row [Income Statement] Cost of sales, D&A is assumed embedded and no separate add-back row should be selected.

No explicit depreciation or amortisation row related to distribution, administrative, SG&A, or R&D appears in the operating-section excerpt above the financial lines. The selected XSGA bucket consists of [Income Statement] Distribution expenses and [Income Statement] Administrative Expenses, and there is no separate same-level D&A line to add. Although XRD was mapped to a supplemental disclosure, no operating-section amortisation/depreciation-in-R&D row is visible here, so no separate XSGA_DA row should be selected.
